headline: Estée Lauder (EL) Faces PT Cuts from JPMorgan and Barclays Ahead of Earnings
summary: The Estée Lauder Companies Inc. (NYSE:EL) is included among the 10 Best US Stocks to Invest in for Long Term. On April 17, JPMorgan lowered its price recommendation on The Estée Lauder Companies Inc. (NYSE:EL) to $98 from $121. However, it maintained an Overweight rating on the shares. The firm also removed the company from […]

headline: Aera Technology to Present Agentic Decision Intelligence at Gartner® Supply Chain Symposium/Xpo™ 2026
summary: MOUNTAIN VIEW, Calif., April 23, 2026--Aera Technology to showcase agentic decision intelligence at Gartner Supply Chain Symposium 2026, featuring Estée Lauder and Kerry Group.

headline: What to Expect From Estée Lauder's Next Quarterly Earnings Report
summary: Estée Lauder is set to announce its third-quarter earnings next month, and Wall Street expects the company’s EPS to increase by a single digit.
